section: Mplexia Limited | AWS Cloud Network Consulting

content:
AWS Cloud Network Consulting # Terraform Expert • GitOps • Global Multi-Region Architectures
10+ years delivering resilient, fully automated AWS networking for high-performance trading and enterprise environments. 20+ years creating intelligent virtual connectivity solutions that power reliable infrastructure.
Mplexia Limited
Schedule a 15-min Discovery Call UK Tax Resident • 100% Remote | Europe
Hi, I’m Ludek Rozehnal # AWS Cloud Network Engineer & Terraform Expert with 20+ years’ experience.
For the last 8+ years I’ve been the primary cloud network architect and IaC authority at Flextrade Systems (UK remote), where I designed and delivered fully automated global multi-region/multi-account AWS networking using Terraform and GitOps.
I combine deep traditional networking knowledge with DevOps practices to eliminate manual processes, reduce risk, and accelerate cloud migrations — especially for low-latency, business-critical workloads.
What I Deliver # Global AWS Networking Architecture # Expert design and implementation of scalable AWS global networks using Transit Gateway, Direct Connect, VPN solutions, multi-region hub-and-spoke or meshed topologies, security hardening, low-latency optimization, and multicast. Specialized support for upgrading and modernizing current architectures.
Cloud Migration & Automation # Helping organizations with connectivity aspects of on-premise to AWS hybrid migrations, introducing or utilizing existing automation (Terraform, Ansible, Python), security hardening and resilience engineering. Helping overcome initial hurdles when introducing cloud automation (Terraform).
AWS Connectivity Consulting & Delivery # Practical assistance with AWS connectivity onboarding, partner integrations, and migrations. I specialize in analyzing your requirements and designing/implementing the most effective solution — combining Direct Connect, VPC Endpoints, peering, and hybrid models to deliver secure, low-latency, and optimized network performance.
Recent Highlights # Flextrade Systems (2018 – 2026) # Senior DevOps / Cloud Network Specialist (UK Remote)
Led flagship 2024–2025 project: complete Terraform + GitOps automation of global multi-region AWS network connectivity Delivered zero manual console changes in production for all networking and infrastructure Architected resilient Transit Gateway and hub-and-spoke topologies for low-latency trading workloads Multicast in AWS, Dynamic propagation of static routes between Transit Gateways, onboarding of various projects of all kinds and sizes 2026 Consulting Rates # £550 – £650 per day
Hourly (£145–£165), project-based and retainer options also available.
Mplexia Limited (UK) • VAT registered if required • Fully remote
Ready to discuss your next AWS networking project? # I work selectively with MSPs, VARs and AWS-heavy organisations on 3–12 month engagements or advisory work.
Book a 15-minute Discovery Call +44 7756 678300 • l.rozehnal@me.com
Mplexia Limited • UK Tax Resident • Fully Remote
